framework.name: NIST AI Risk Management Framework
framework.description: Framework for managing risks in the design, development, and use of AI systems.

controls.title: Governance Structures
controls.description: Establish governance structures for AI system oversight.
controls.implementationGuidance: Define roles and responsibilities for AI governance.
controls.evidenceGuidance: Document governance charter and RACI matrix.

controls.title: Context Establishment
controls.description: Establish the context for AI system risk management.
controls.implementationGuidance: Document data flows and system boundaries.
controls.evidenceGuidance: Provide data flow diagrams and context documentation.

controls.title: Risk Response
controls.description: Develop and implement risk response strategies.
controls.implementationGuidance: Define risk acceptance and mitigation procedures.
